query:
SELECT 
            t.id,
            t.type_cd,
            t.type_name,
            t.type_name_k,
            t.type_name_r,
            t.type_name_zh,
            t.type_name_ko,
            t.color,
            t.direction,
            t.kind,
            s.station_cd,
            sst.line_group_cd,
            sst.pass
            FROM 
            station_station_types as sst, 
            stations as s, 
            types as t 
            WHERE 
            s.station_cd IN (SELECT unnest($1::bigint[]))
            AND CASE WHEN t.top_priority = 1
            THEN
                sst.type_cd = t.type_cd
            ELSE
                sst.pass <> 1
                AND sst.type_cd = t.type_cd
            END
            AND s.station_cd = sst.station_cd
            AND sst.type_cd = t.type_cd 
            AND s.e_status = 0
            AND sst.line_group_cd = $2
            AND sst.pass <> 1
            ORDER BY t.kind, sst.id
